title: Local AI Agents Masterclass (Gemma 4 + OpenCode + Odysseus tutorial)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating setup and use of local AI agents including Odysseus, an agent workspace compatible with Ollama and Gemma 4, and OpenCode, a build agent. The workflow demonstrates running frontier models for planning and local models for execution, with examples of building web applications through natural language commands.
writeup: This tutorial walks through setting up local AI agents using Odysseus, an agent workspace compatible with Ollama and Gemma 4, alongside OpenCode as a build agent. The central workflow splits responsibilities: frontier models handle planning while local models handle execution, with examples that build web applications from natural language commands. It covers agentic workflows, local inference, teacher models, and fallback providers, illustrating how a hybrid local and remote setup can run agents without depending entirely on hosted inference.
